name: Disable-RunspaceDebug

options.name: -AppDomainName
options.description: The name of the application domain that hosts the PowerShell runspace.

options.name: -ProcessName
options.description: The name of the process that hosts the PowerShell runspace.

options.name: -Runspace
options.description: One or more Runspace objects to be disabled.

options.name: -RunspaceId
options.description: One or more Runspace Id numbers to be disabled.

options.name: -RunspaceInstanceId
options.description: One or more Runspace GUIDs to be disabled.

options.name: -RunspaceName
options.description: One or more Runspace names to be disabled.

description: Disables debugging on one or more runspaces, and releases any pending debugger stop.
